translations.### iOS HLS Cache 實踐方法探究之旅\n\n: ### Exploring Practical Methods for iOS HLS Cache Implementation
translations.#### 方案 2.2–2 同方案 2.2 但是搭配 方案 1 AVAssetR: #### Solution 2.2–2 – Same as Solution 2.2 but combined with Solution 1 AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate ❌
translations.#### 方案 3. Reverse Proxy Server ⍻ (可行，但非: #### Solution 3. Reverse Proxy Server ⍻ (Feasible but Not Perfect)

translations.#### 方案 5. 不使用 AVFoundation AVPlayer 播放音: #### Solution 5. Not Using AVFoundation AVPlayer to Play Audio Files ✔
translations.#### 方案 7. 下載完整檔案後再播放 ⍻\n\n: #### Option 7. Download the Entire File Before Playback ⍻
translations.**EXT-X-ALLOW-CACHE 已在 [iOS≥ 8/Protocol: **EXT-X-ALLOW-CACHE has been [deprecated since iOS≥ 8/Protocol Ver.7](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/http_live_streaming/about_the_ext-x-version_tag?language=objc){:target="_blank"}, so having this line is meaningless.**
translations.**太硬核了，需要很深的技術能力及大量時間；沒研究。**\n\n: **Too hardcore, requires deep technical skills and a lot of time; no research done.**
translations.**完整實作範例可參考：**\n\n: **A complete implementation example can be found at:**
translations.**是說畢竟是依賴在其他服務上，開發環境測試沒問題，實際應用也建議要接個 rol: **Since it relies on other services, testing in the development environment may work fine, but in actual use, it is recommended to implement a rollback mechanism (AVPlayer.AVPlayerItemFailedToPlayToEndTimeErrorKey notification); otherwise, if the service fails, the user will get stuck.**
translations.**網路上有找到很繞的方法…就是發個長請求、或不斷發空的請求確保 Server: **There are complicated methods found online… such as sending a long request or continuously sending empty requests to ensure the server is not suspended by the system in the background.**
translations.**詳細實作可參考此範例：**\n\n: **For detailed implementation, please refer to this example:**
translations.**這邊比較像是做離線播放而非做 Cache 的功能。**\n\n: **This is more like offline playback rather than a caching feature.**
translations.- Custom Cache strategies can use PINCac:
- Custom Cache strategies can use PINCache or others…

- Externally, just call the make AVAsset factory with the URL, and the AVAsset will support caching.

- Using Combine to implement data flow strategy

- Wrote some tests
translations.- Next article: \"[Complete Guide to Imp: - Next article: "[Complete Guide to Implementing Local Cache with AVPlayer](../6ce488898003/)" teaches you how to achieve AVPlayer caching.
translations.AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate 實作可參考「 [AV: The implementation of AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate can refer to "[AVPlayer 邊播邊 Cache 實戰](../ee47f8f1e2d2/)".
translations.GCDWebServer 的說明是當進入背景時會自動斷線、回前景自動恢復，但可以: The description of GCDWebServer states that it will automatically disconnect when entering the background and automatically resume when returning to the foreground. However, you can disable this behavior by setting the parameter `GCDWebServerOption_AutomaticallySuspendInBackground:false`.
translations.HTTP Live Streaming (簡稱HLS) 是蘋果提出基於HTTP的: HTTP Live Streaming (HLS) is Apple's HTTP-based streaming media network transmission protocol.
translations.URLProtocol 也是最近才學到的方法，所有基於 `URL Loading: URLProtocol is a method I recently learned. All requests based on the `URL Loading System` (URLSession, API calls, image downloads, etc.) can be intercepted by us to modify the Request and Response, then return them as if nothing happened, secretly. You can refer to [this article](https://www.jianshu.com/p/fbe57730d3e1){:target="_blank"} for more on URLProtocol.
translations.URLProtocol 會攔截到 `streetVoiceCache://zhg: URLProtocol intercepts `streetVoiceCache://zhgchg.li/aviciiwakemeup.m3u8?originSchme=https`. At this point, we just need to restore it to the original URL and use URLSession to fetch the data, allowing us to handle caching here. The `.ts` file requests in the m3u8 will also be intercepted by URLProtocol, so we can cache them ourselves as well.
translations.`.m3u8` 檔就是紀錄這些分割的 `.ts` 小檔案的碼率、播放順序、時間: `.m3u8` files record the bitrate, playback order, duration of these segmented `.ts` files, as well as the overall audio information. They can also support encryption, decryption, low-latency live streaming, and more.
translations.一切看似都那麼完美，但當我興高采烈的 Build-Run 完 APP 後，蘋果直: Everything seemed perfect, but when I excitedly built and ran the app, Apple slapped me in the face:
translations.一樣，很抱歉，此路也不通；因為 AVFoundation AVPlayer 的請:
Similarly, sorry, this approach also doesn't work; because AVFoundation AVPlayer's requests are not handled by the `URL Loading System`, we cannot intercept them.  
**There is a saying that it works on the simulator but not on a real device**
translations.下方 已下載的影片 部分\n\n:
### Downloaded Videos

Downloaded videos refer to media files that have been fully saved to the device storage before playback. This method ensures smooth playback without relying on network conditions.

Advantages:
- Playback is fast and stable.
- No network usage during playback.
- Suitable for offline viewing.

Disadvantages:
- Requires sufficient storage space.
- Initial download time may be long.
- Not suitable for dynamic streaming content.

Implementation typically involves downloading the entire .m3u8 playlist and all associated .ts segment files, then playing them locally using AVPlayer with a local file URL.
translations.下篇「 [AVPlayer 實踐本地 Cache 功能大全](../6ce488: Next article: "[Complete Guide to Implementing Local Cache with AVPlayer](../6ce488898003/)" teaches you how to achieve AVPlayer caching.
translations.不過很抱歉，此路不通，因為無法在 Delegate 中攔截到 `.ts` 檔案的: However, sorry, this approach does not work because the download requests for `.ts` files cannot be intercepted in the Delegate. This issue is confirmed in this [Q&A](https://stackoverflow.com/questions/29752028/unknown-error-12881-when-using-avassetresourceloader/30239876#30239876){:target="_blank"} and the [official documentation](https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/technotes/tn2232/_index.html#//apple_ref/doc/uid/DTS40012884-CH1-SECHTTPLIVESTREAMING){:target="_blank"}.
translations.他不吃我給 `.ts` 檔案 Request 的 Response Data，我: It does not accept the Response Data I provide for the `.ts` file Request. I can only use the `urlProtocol:wasRedirectedTo` method to redirect to the original HTTPS request for playback to work properly. Even if I download the `.ts` file locally and then redirect to that file:// path, it is still not accepted. According to the [official forum](https://forums.developer.apple.com/thread/30833){:target="_blank"}, the answer is that this cannot be done. The `.m3u8` must come from HTTP/HTTPS (so even if you put the entire `.m3u8` and all the segmented `.ts` files locally, you cannot use file:// to play them with AVPlayer). Also, `.ts` files cannot provide Data via URLProtocol on your own.
translations.以上的探索路程大概花了快一整週，繞來繞去、快要喪心病狂了；目前還沒有一個可靠的、: The above exploration took almost a whole week, going round and round, nearly driving me crazy; currently, there is no reliable and easy-to-deploy method.
translations.以上都是針對 APP 在背景的狀況，在前景時 Server 很穩，也不會因為閒置: The above issues all occur when the app is in the background. When in the foreground, the server is stable and won't be paused due to idling—there is no such problem!
translations.以往非串流時 mp3/mp4 沒什麼好處理的，就是在播放前先下載到設備上，下載完: In the past, for non-streaming mp3/mp4 files, there was not much to handle. The file was downloaded to the device before playback, and playback started only after the download completed. Since the file had to be fully downloaded anyway, we could simply use URLSession to download the file first, then feed the local file path with a file:// URL to AVPlayer for playback. Alternatively, the proper method is to use AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate to cache the downloaded data within the delegate methods.
translations.以播放音樂來說，非串流情況下我們使用 mp3 作為音樂檔，這個檔案有多大就要花多: For playing music, in non-streaming cases, we use mp3 files. The file size determines how long it takes to fully download before playback. HLS, on the other hand, splits one file into multiple small segments, playing as it reads each segment. So playback can start as soon as the first segment is received, without downloading the entire file!
translations.但實際 AVFoundation AVPlayer 並沒有任何 HTTP Cli: However, in reality, AVFoundation AVPlayer does not have any HTTP Client Caching effect, so this approach is also not feasible—just wishful thinking.
translations.但是實測如果一段時間沒有發送請求 Server 還是會斷線 (且狀態會是錯的，還: However, in practice, if no requests are sent for a period of time, the server will still disconnect (and the status will be incorrect, still showing isRunning). It feels like the system is killing it. After digging into the [HTTP Server approach](https://izeeshan.wordpress.com/2014/08/25/local-http-server-for-ios/){:target="_blank"}, which is based on sockets at the core, and checking the [official socket service documentation](https://developer.apple.com/library/archive/technotes/tn2277/_index.html){:target="_blank"}, this issue cannot be resolved. The system will suspend the server when there are no new connections in the background.
translations.使用 AVPlayer 播放 m3u8 串流影音檔時如何做到邊播放邊 Cache: How to Achieve Simultaneous Playback and Caching When Using AVPlayer to Play m3u8 Streaming Video Files
translations.使用 Combine 實現 Data Flow 策略\n: Using Combine to Implement Data Flow Strategy
translations.原理也很簡單，APP 上 On 一個 HTTP Server 假設是 8080: The principle is simple: the app runs an HTTP Server on, say, port 8080, so the URL becomes `http://127.0.0.1:8080/`; then we can handle incoming requests and provide responses.
translations.另外使用者也能從「設定」->「一般」->「iPhone 儲存空間」-> APP: Users can also view and manage downloaded audio files from "Settings" -> "General" -> "iPhone Storage" -> APP.
translations.可以拿來做解密處理(可以參考 [此篇文章](https://medium.com: It can be used for decryption processing (refer to [this article](https://medium.com/@marslin_dev/how-to-play-aes-encrypted-video-with-airplay-2-82a353044f40){:target="_blank"} or [this example](https://www.jianshu.com/p/2c2cbe173e99){:target="_blank"}), but caching functionality still cannot be achieved.
translations.同方案 5 ， **太硬核了，需要很深的技術能力及大量時間；沒研究。**\n\n: Same as Solution 5, **too hardcore, requires deep technical skills and a lot of time; not explored.**
translations.因為我也是參考此範例做的，所以 Local HTTP Server 的部分我也是: Because I also referred to this example, I used [GCDWebServer](https://github.com/swisspol/GCDWebServer){:target="_blank"} for the Local HTTP Server part. There is also a newer option called [Telegraph](https://github.com/Building42/Telegraph){:target="_blank"}. (I do not recommend [CocoaHttpServer](https://github.com/robbiehanson/CocoaHTTPServer){:target="_blank"} since it hasn't been updated for a long time)
translations.在 HTTP Server 的 Handler 上對 `*.m3u8` 攔截處理: Intercept `*.m3u8` requests on the HTTP Server's Handler. When a request comes in, it will enter our Handler, allowing us to do whatever we want and control the response data. `.ts` files will also come through here; this is where we can implement our desired caching mechanism.
translations.外部只需呼叫 make AVAsset 工廠，帶入 URL，則 AVAsset: Externally, just call the make AVAsset factory with the URL, and the AVAsset will support caching.
translations.套用到我們的案例就是，把請求網址換成：\n`http://127.0.0.1:8:
Applied to our case, replace the request URL with:
`http://127.0.0.1:8080/aviciiwakemeup.m3u8?origin=http://zhgchg.li/`
translations.如果有新的想法再來更新!\n\n: Will update if there are new ideas!
translations.客製化 Cache 策略，可以用 PINCache or 其他…\n: Custom Cache strategies can use PINCache or others…
translations.實作方式如方案 2.2 ，餵給 AVPlayer 自訂的 Scheme 讓他進: The implementation follows method 2.2, feeding AVPlayer with a custom Scheme to enter AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate; then we handle it ourselves.
translations.對 AVPlayer 來說就是個 http://.m3u8 的標準串流音訊檔，所: For AVPlayer, it is just a standard http://.m3u8 streaming audio file, so there will be no issues.
translations.對於一個影音串流服務， **Cache 非常之重要** ；因為每個音訊檔案小則: For a streaming service, **cache is extremely important**; audio files can range from a few MB to several GB. If every replay requires downloading the file again from the server, it puts a heavy load on the server and results in high data costs. Having a cache layer can save a lot of money for the service and also prevents users from wasting bandwidth and time on repeated downloads. It's a win-win mechanism (but remember to set limits and clear cache regularly to avoid filling up the user's device).
translations.應用此方法，我們打算攔截 AVFoundation AVPlayer 在要求 `: Using this method, we plan to intercept AVFoundation AVPlayer requests for `.m3u8` and `.ts` files. If the data is cached locally, we return the cached data directly; otherwise, we send the actual request. This approach can also achieve our goal.
translations.我們的 `.m3u8/.ts` 檔的 Response Headers 都有給予: Our `.m3u8/.ts` files' Response Headers include `Cache-Control`, `Age`, `eTag`, and other HTTP Client Cache information. Our website's cache mechanism works perfectly on Chrome. Additionally, the official preliminary specification for the [Protocol Extension for Low-Latency HLS](https://developer.apple.com/documentation/http_live_streaming/protocol_extension_for_low-latency_hls_preliminary_specification){:target="_blank"} also mentions that cache-control headers can be set for caching.
translations.我們的服務是音樂串流而非影音播放平台，音樂串流很多時候使用者都是在背景執行音樂切: Our service is music streaming, not a video playback platform. In music streaming, users often switch tracks while the app runs in the background; will the Local HTTP Server still be running then?
translations.我們退而求其次退回去使用 mp3 檔，這樣就能直接使用 `AVAssetReso: As a fallback, we switched back to using mp3 files, which allows direct implementation with `AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate`. For detailed implementation, please refer to "[AVPlayer Streaming Cache Practical Guide](../ee47f8f1e2d2/)".
translations.我將之前的實作開源了，有需求的朋友可直接使用。\n\n: I have open-sourced my previous implementation. Feel free to use it if you need.
translations.播放部分我們一樣直接使用 iOS AVFoundation 的 AVPlayer: For playback, we still use iOS AVFoundation's AVPlayer directly. There is no difference in handling streaming or non-streaming files.
translations.有任何問題及指教歡迎 [與我聯絡](https://www.zhgchg.li/: If you have any questions or feedback, feel free to [contact me](https://www.zhgchg.li/contact){:target="_blank"}.
translations.有興趣可參考 [此篇文章](https://github.com/xyqjay/: If interested, you can refer to [this article](https://github.com/xyqjay/m3u8ToMP4){:target="_blank"}.
translations.根據 方案 2.1 腦洞大開的暴力法，如果我把請求網址換成一個自訂的 Schem: According to Method 2.1, the brute force approach, if I change the request URL to a custom scheme (e.g., streetVoiceCache://), AVFoundation cannot handle this request and will throw it out. This way, our URLProtocol can intercept it and do what we want.
translations.沒研究，但的確可行；不過想起來就覺得複雜，要處理已下載的 `.ts` 檔案，個別: No research done, but it is indeed feasible; however, it sounds complicated. You would need to handle the downloaded `.ts` files individually, convert them to .mp3 or .mp4 files, then play them in order, or compress them into a single file. It doesn't seem easy to do.
translations.第一個想法就是，那我們就照 mp3/mp4 時的做法就好啦！一樣用 AVAsse: The first idea was to do the same as with mp3/mp4! Use AVAssetResourceLoaderDelegate and cache the `.ts` files within the Delegate methods.
translations.自己實現音訊檔解析、緩存、編碼、播放功能。\n\n: Implement audio file parsing, caching, encoding, and playback functions by yourself.
translations.要實作的話要用到 iOS ≥ 10 的 API `AVAssetDownload: To implement this, you need to use the iOS ≥ 10 API `AVAssetDownloadTask.makeAssetDownloadTask`, which actually packages the `.m3u8` into a **`.movpkg`** stored locally for user playback.
translations.這個方法不能確切叫邊播邊 Cache，實際是載下整個音訊檔案的內容，然後才開始播: This method cannot be strictly called streaming with cache; it actually downloads the entire audio file first and then starts playback. For `.m3u8` files, as mentioned in solution 2.2, you cannot directly download and play them locally.
translations.這個方法是在找如何處理 HLS Cache 時，最多人給的答案；就是在 APP: This method is the most common answer when looking for how to handle HLS Cache; that is, starting an HTTP Server on the APP to act as a Reverse Proxy Server.
translations.遇到串流想法其實也很直白，就是先讀 `.m3u8` 檔，然後在解析裡面的資訊，對: The idea behind streaming is actually straightforward: first read the `.m3u8` file, then parse its information and cache each `.ts` file. However, implementation proved to be much more complicated than I expected, which is why I wrote this article!
translations.針對我們的目標能達成的幾個方案及實踐時遇到的問題。\n\n: Several possible solutions for our goal and the issues encountered during implementation.
translations.附上一個網路開源播放器做參考： [FreeStreamer](https://g: Here is an open-source online player for reference: [FreeStreamer](https://github.com/muhku/FreeStreamer){:target="_blank"}. If you really choose this solution, it's better to stand on the shoulders of giants and use a third-party library directly.
